settings.lede: From Managed IT and Cyber Security to AI-powered SaaS and custom AI agents — we provide the engine that runs your business outcome. Proactive, Perth-based, performance-first.

settings.words: MANAGED IT | CYBER SECURITY | AI AGENTS | CLOUD | COMPLIANCE | PROCUREMENT

settings.headline: Modern IT for modern teams.
settings.lede: Pick your starting point. Scale as you go.

settings.headline: Six AI-powered applications. One ecosystem.
settings.lede: Every EvoTech SaaS app is built on EvolveAI-Engine to automate your workflows, SOC triage, and compliance exports.
We build, host and train custom AI agents on the EvolveAI-Engine. Deployed on a private Perth VPS, they handle support, sales and intake — 24/7.

settings.title: Support Agent
settings.description: Handles L1 support tickets, FAQs and basic troubleshooting. Escalates to human via Slack/Teams.

settings.title: Sales Agent
settings.description: Qualifies leads, schedules demos via Calendly and updates your CRM in real-time.

settings.title: Intake Agent
settings.description: Collects documents, verifies identity and processes applications for finance or medical teams.

settings.title: Custom Agent
settings.description: Need something bespoke? We build custom agents for specialized industry workflows.

settings.text: Trained on your private data only
Full audit log of every conversation

settings.title: Single agent
settings.features:
• Custom trained on your FAQ/Docs
  • Web-chat or WhatsApp integration
  • Private Perth VPS hosting
  • Weekly retraining session
  • Basic analytics dashboard
  • Email support (Perth based)

settings.title: Multi-channel agent
settings.features:
• Everything in Launch
  • Slack & Teams integrations
  • Calendar booking capability
  • API access for CRM sync
  • Monthly optimization report
  • Priority human support
  • Custom brand front-panel

settings.title: Business integration
settings.features:
• Everything in Growth
  • Up to 3 linked agents (e.g. Support + Sales + Intake)
  • Custom integrations (CRM, ticketing, Google Workspace)
  • White-label front panel for your team
  • Handoff-to-human workflow with routing rules
  • Role-based access for staff
  • 90 days post-launch support + quarterly retraining

settings.title: Brief
settings.description: 30-minute strategy call. We define the agent's job, success metric and channel.

settings.title: Data hand-off
settings.description: You upload FAQs, docs, website content, policies. We clean, chunk and embed it.

settings.title: Train & deploy
settings.description: We train the agent on Evolve AI, provision the VPS and wire the front panel.

settings.title: Go live
settings.description: Two refinement rounds with you, then launch on your website, WhatsApp or channel of choice.

settings.lede: Every EvoTech SaaS application is sold standalone or bundled — all powered by EvolveAI-Engine. Start with one, grow into the full stack without a migration.

settings.headline: Four steps from sign-up to outcome.
settings.lede: Onboarding is fast — most customers go from free-trial to first automated workflow in under 30 minutes.

settings.title: Generate Workflow
settings.body: Pick a template or describe an outcome. EvolveAI-Engine assembles the workflow.

settings.title: Create APIs
settings.body: One-click OAuth into 400+ apps — no auth code to write.

settings.title: Collect Data
settings.body: Real-time observability on every run with full audit trail.

settings.title: Analyse Outcomes
settings.body: Exec-ready dashboards — and compliance packs ready to export.

settings.headline: Everything you wanted to ask.
settings.lede: Pricing, data residency, integrations, onboarding — all answered below.

settings.question: What is EvolveAI-Engine?
settings.answer: EvolveAI-Engine is the flagship autonomous-AI engine that powers every EvoTech SaaS app. It lives at evolve.evotech.au and runs every workflow, SOC triage, compliance check, and governance review across the ecosystem.

settings.question: Is my data stored in Australia?
settings.answer: Yes — all data is hosted in Australian AWS regions with optional single-tenant isolation. No data leaves AU soil.

settings.question: How do custom AI agents work?
settings.answer: You give us the data you want the agent to know — FAQs, SOPs, product info, past conversations. We clean it, train an agent on EvolveAI, provision a Perth-based VPS, and ship you a front-panel dashboard. Two refinement rounds are included before go-live.

settings.question: Can I buy just one SaaS app?
settings.answer: Yes. Every product is sold standalone. Add more later with no migration.

settings.question: Is support included?
settings.answer: Yes — Perth-based human support on every plan, with 1-hour SLA on paid tiers and 24/7 coverage on Scale.

settings.question: Is there a money-back guarantee?
settings.answer: Yes — 30-day unconditional refund on any annual plan.

settings.headline: Let's modernise your entire stack.
settings.lede: From hardware to Managed IT to six AI-powered SaaS apps and custom AI agents — one conversation is all it takes.
